title: Fair Housing Act Compliance
description: Apply Fair Housing Act protections in screening, advertising, and rental decisions.

title: Disability Accommodation Process
description: Provide reasonable accommodation and modification process for disabled applicants and tenants.

title: Non-Discriminatory Advertising
description: Restrict listing language to lawful descriptors and prohibit protected-class steering.

title: ECOA Adverse Action Notice
description: Send ECOA-compliant adverse action notice for denied rental credit applications.

title: FCRA Pre-Adverse Action
description: Provide pre-adverse action notice with consumer report copy before denial.

title: FCRA Permissible Purpose
description: Document permissible purpose for every consumer report pulled on applicants.

title: RESPA Section 8 Anti-Kickback
description: Prohibit kickbacks or referral fees for real estate settlement services.

title: Good Faith Estimate Disclosure
description: Provide GFE / Loan Estimate within 3 business days of mortgage application.

title: TILA APR Disclosure
description: Disclose APR, finance charge, and total payments per TILA on consumer mortgages.

title: TRID Loan Estimate / Closing Disclosure
description: Issue TRID Loan Estimate and Closing Disclosure on integrated forms with 3-day review.

title: ADA Public Accommodation
description: Provide ADA Title III accessibility for leasing offices, common areas, and websites.

title: WCAG 2.2 AA Tenant Portal
description: Achieve WCAG 2.2 AA conformance for tenant and applicant-facing web portals.

title: GDPR Article 6 Lawful Basis
description: Establish lawful basis for processing tenant personal data under GDPR Article 6.

title: GDPR Article 28 DPA
description: Sign Article 28 DPAs with property management software vendors processing tenant data.

title: CCPA Consumer Right to Delete
description: Honor CCPA / CPRA consumer right to delete personal data from rental databases.

title: Do Not Sell My Personal Information
description: Provide CCPA Do Not Sell / Share opt-out link on real estate marketing pages.

title: AML Beneficial Ownership
description: Collect beneficial ownership for cash real estate purchases under FinCEN GTO.

title: FinCEN Real Estate Reporting
description: Submit FinCEN reports for non-financed residential real estate purchases over threshold.

title: REIT 75% Asset Test
description: Maintain at least 75% of REIT assets in real estate, cash, or government securities.

title: REIT 90% Distribution Requirement
description: Distribute at least 90% of REIT taxable income to shareholders annually.

title: ENERGY STAR Portfolio Manager
description: Benchmark commercial buildings in ENERGY STAR Portfolio Manager where required by city ordinance.

title: BOMA Best Practices
description: Adopt BOMA International best practices for commercial property operations.

title: LEED Certification Tracking
description: Track LEED certification milestones and credits for sustainable buildings.

title: WELL Building Standard
description: Document WELL Building Standard performance for occupant health and wellness.

title: EPA RRP Lead-Safe Practices
description: Apply EPA RRP lead-safe work practices in pre-1978 residential rentals.

title: EPA Asbestos NESHAP
description: Comply with EPA Asbestos NESHAP for demolition and renovation work.

title: EPA Radon Disclosure
description: Disclose known radon hazards in residential property transactions.

title: Security Deposit Limits
description: Enforce state-specific security deposit caps and accounting requirements.

title: Eviction Notice Periods
description: Apply state-mandated notice periods for non-payment, nuisance, and lease termination.

title: Implied Warranty of Habitability
description: Maintain habitable conditions under state implied warranty of habitability.

title: USPAP Appraisal Standards
description: Apply USPAP standards to all real estate appraisals.

title: Appraiser Independence
description: Maintain appraiser independence per Dodd-Frank Section 1472.

title: Fannie Mae Selling Guide
description: Underwrite conventional loans per Fannie Mae Selling Guide.

title: Freddie Mac Loan Guide
description: Apply Freddie Mac Single-Family Loan Guide to conforming mortgages.

title: FHA 4000.1 Handbook
description: Originate FHA loans per Single Family Handbook 4000.1.

title: VA Lender Handbook
description: Originate VA loans per VA Lender Handbook 26-7.

title: MERS Mortgage Recording
description: Manage mortgage assignments through MERS where applicable.

title: ALTA Best Practices
description: Adopt ALTA Best Practices for title and settlement service providers.

title: NAR Code of Ethics
description: Bind REALTOR licensees to NAR Code of Ethics and Standards of Practice.

title: MLS Data Use Policies
description: Comply with MLS rules on listing data display, syndication, and IDX feeds.

title: RESO Data Dictionary
description: Use RESO Data Dictionary 1.7 for property feeds.

title: EU AML5 Real Estate Agents
description: Apply EU 5th AML Directive obligations to real estate agents and intermediaries.

title: EU EPBD Energy Performance
description: Provide EPC energy performance certificate per EU EPBD on EU property sales / rentals.

title: UK Assured Shorthold Tenancy
description: Issue UK AST agreements with prescribed information and deposit protection.

title: UK EPC MEES
description: Maintain UK EPC E-rating minimum under MEES regulations for non-domestic and domestic lets.

title: DE Mietpreisbremse Compliance
description: Apply German Mietpreisbremse rent caps in regulated metropolitan areas.

title: FR ALUR Tenancy Law
description: Apply Loi ALUR tenancy obligations for French residential rentals.

title: AUSTRAC Real Estate Reporting
description: Submit threshold transaction reports to AUSTRAC for AU property dealings.

title: FINTRAC Real Estate Reporting
description: Report large cash transactions to FINTRAC for Canadian real estate.

title: JP Takken-gyo License
description: Hold Takken-gyo license for Japanese real estate brokerage.

title: ASC 842 Lease Accounting
description: Recognize lessee right-of-use assets and liabilities per ASC 842.

title: IFRS 16 Lease Accounting
description: Apply IFRS 16 single lessee accounting model for non-IFRS-exempt leases.

title: OSHA Multi-Family Maintenance Safety
description: Train maintenance staff on OSHA hazard communication, fall protection, and lockout-tagout.

title: Tenant Screening Accuracy
description: Ensure tenant background reports meet FCRA accuracy standards.

title: GDPR Data Subject Access
description: Honor data subject access requests within 30 days for tenant records.

title: GDPR Right to Erasure
description: Erase tenant personal data on valid Article 17 request when no lawful retention basis applies.

title: PCI DSS for Rent Payments
description: Process rent card payments through PCI DSS-compliant gateways.

title: NACHA ACH Operating Rules
description: Process ACH rent debits per NACHA Operating Rules with WEB authorization.

title: EU PSD2 Strong Customer Authentication
description: Apply PSD2 SCA for EU online rent payments.

title: Source-of-Income Discrimination
description: Prohibit source-of-income discrimination where state/local law requires.

title: International Building Code
description: Construct and renovate per local IBC adoption with permits.

title: NFPA Fire Code Compliance
description: Maintain fire alarm, sprinkler, and egress systems per NFPA 1.

title: ADA Path of Travel
description: Ensure ADA path of travel and accessible parking at public-facing properties.

title: Assistance Animal Accommodation
description: Accept assistance animal accommodation requests with reliable documentation.

title: EPA NPDES Stormwater Permit
description: Obtain NPDES stormwater permit for construction activities over 1 acre.

title: Section 404 Wetlands Permit
description: Obtain Section 404 permit for construction discharges into US waters or wetlands.

title: BSA SAR Filing
description: File BSA SARs for suspicious real-estate-related cash flows.

title: NIST CSF for PropTech
description: Adopt NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0 for property technology platforms.

title: SOC 2 Type II Tenant Portal
description: Achieve SOC 2 Type II for tenant portal Security and Confidentiality.

title: ISO 27001 Property Data ISMS
description: Operate ISO 27001 ISMS over rental application and lease data systems.

title: ENERGY STAR Score Disclosure
description: Disclose ENERGY STAR score on commercial leases where municipal law requires.

title: BREEAM Certification
description: Track BREEAM certification credits for European commercial assets.

title: GRESB ESG Benchmark
description: Submit annual GRESB ESG performance for institutional real estate portfolios.

title: Real Estate Broker License
description: Maintain active state broker license for all licensed agents and supervising brokers.

title: Continuing Education
description: Complete state-mandated CE hours for license renewal.

title: QM/ATR Compliance
description: Originate Qualified Mortgages with Ability-to-Repay analysis.

title: HMDA Loan Application Register
description: Submit HMDA LAR with mortgage application data annually.

title: CRA Community Lending
description: Track CRA community lending activity for regulated depository lenders.

title: OFAC SDN Screening
description: Screen tenants, buyers, and counterparties against OFAC SDN list.

title: Just-Cause Eviction
description: Apply just-cause eviction rules in jurisdictions that require them.

title: Rent Stabilization Compliance
description: Apply rent stabilization caps and registration in regulated jurisdictions.

title: Limited English Proficiency
description: Provide language access for LEP applicants per HUD LEP guidance.

title: ANSI A117.1 Accessible Design
description: Design new construction per ANSI A117.1 accessibility standard.

title: Mold Remediation Procedures
description: Use OSHA / EPA mold remediation procedures during property turnover.

title: Lead Disclosure Form
description: Provide EPA lead disclosure form on pre-1978 residential leases and sales.

title: Flood Insurance Disclosure
description: Disclose flood zone status and require NFIP coverage in SFHAs.

title: Property Tax Assessment Appeal
description: Manage property tax assessment appeals within statutory deadlines.

title: Section 1031 Like-Kind Exchange
description: Track 45-day identification and 180-day completion windows for 1031 exchanges.

title: EU AIFMD Real Estate Funds
description: Comply with EU AIFMD for real estate alternative investment funds.

title: SEC Reg D Private Placement
description: File Form D for Reg D 506(b) / 506(c) real estate syndications.

title: SEC Reg CF Crowdfunding
description: Use SEC-registered funding portals for Regulation Crowdfunding real estate offerings.

title: Algorithmic Tenant Scoring Audit
description: Audit algorithmic tenant scoring models for disparate impact under Fair Housing.

title: Adverse Action Reasons Detail
description: Provide specific adverse action reasons including model factors used.

title: Reasonable Modification at Tenant Cost
description: Permit tenant-paid reasonable modifications for accessibility under FHA.

title: GDPR Privacy Notice for Tenants
description: Publish GDPR-compliant privacy notice covering tenant lifecycle data.

title: CCPA Privacy Notice at Collection
description: Provide CCPA notice at collection on tenant application forms.

title: Move-In/Move-Out Inspection
description: Conduct documented move-in and move-out condition inspections per state law.

title: GLBA Safeguards Rule
description: Apply GLBA Safeguards Rule to non-public personal information of mortgage applicants.

title: EU DAC7 Platform Reporting
description: Report short-term rental platform sellers per EU DAC7 directive.

title: Cross-Regime DSAR Workflow
description: Operate unified DSAR workflow covering GDPR, CCPA, CPRA, and state privacy laws.
